steps.title: Identify the criterion
steps.content: The phrase “the park with the highest monthly recreation visits in all three months” requires finding which park led the chart in June, July, and August.

steps.title: Compare the data
steps.content: Yellowstone dominates with 950, 1,050, and 925 thousand visits across the three months. Rocky Mountain, Grand Canyon, and Zion each record lower values in every month. That is the correct answer.
